hooks.command: CMD=$(jq -r '"\(.tool_name) \(.tool_input.command // empty)"'); skillgate gateway check --command "$CMD" --capability shell.exec >/dev/null 2>/dev/null; exit 0
CMD=$(jq -r '"\(.tool_name) \(.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.notebook_path // empty)"'); skillgate gateway check --command "$CMD" --capability fs.write >/dev/null 2>/dev/null; exit 0
CMD=$(jq -r '"\(.tool_name) \(.tool_input.url // empty)"'); skillgate gateway check --command "$CMD" --capability net.outbound >/dev/null 2>/dev/null; exit 0
CMD=$(jq -r '"Task \(.tool_input.description // empty)"'); skillgate gateway check --command "$CMD" --capability process.spawn >/dev/null 2>/dev/null; exit 0
OUTPUT=$(jq -r '.tool_response.output // empty'); skillgate gateway scan-output --output-text "$OUTPUT" >/dev/null 2>/dev/null; exit 0
